title: Polycarena capillaris
taxonomy: Polycarena capillaris is classified within the family Scrophulariaceae. It belongs to the genus Polycarena, which is a group of flowering plants endemic to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The species is further classified as Polycarena capillaris, making it a specific species within the broader Polycarena genus. The classification of Polycarena capillaris is a part of the Angiosperm Phylogeny Group III (APG III) system of plant classification. This system categorizes Polycarena capillaris as a member of the order Lamiales.
